2606.09416.title: Harness Engineering for Physical AI: Robot Middleware Is the Harness Layer
2606.09416.paper_summary: Robot middleware faces a new role in the era of Physical AI. Learned policies, planners, and vision-language-action (VLA) models now enter deployed robots as causal participants on the control path, but the layer that integrates them with timing, scheduling, and network has not been named. Recent language-agent work names this layer the harness, the external system that mediates tools, manages state, bounds resources, and records execution. The robotics community has not yet adopted this framing, and we propose that robot middleware is that harness. A Physical AI harness differs from a software harness in where it intervenes. A software harness mediates at tool-call boundaries. A Physical AI harness must mediate at control, computing, and communication simultaneously, because a learned policy's output crosses all three: its commands shift the trajectory, its inference time shifts the schedule, and its payload shifts the bandwidth. Robot middleware is the lowest robot-stack layer with mediating abstractions over all three, so it is best positioned to compose their enforcement. It already provides most of what a harness needs but lacks the enforcement for an AI model. We name this missing enforcement as three functions: Projection gates each output at emission, Isolation bounds the model's execution and transmission slot, and Transfer falls back to a verified baseline when checks fail. Each appears today as hand-built application code in deployed robot systems, built on surfaces robot middleware already provides. Robot middleware should host them not as the best single-axis enforcer but as the layer that composes all three. We sketch this as a ROS 2 Harness Profile, a deployment artifact that carries an AI model's declared output region, inference budget, and operating regime while the middleware enforces them across ROS 2, DDS, and Zenoh.
2606.09416.paper_summary_zh: 機器人中介軟體在物理人工智慧時代面臨新的角色。學習到的政策、規劃者和視覺-語言-行動（VLA）模型現在作為控制路徑上的因果參與者進入部署的機器人，但將它們與時間、排程和網路整合的層尚未被命名。最近的語言代理工作將這一層命名為「鞍具」，這是一個外部系統，用於調解工具、管理狀態、界定資源並記錄執行。機器人社群尚未採納這一框架，我們提出機器人中介軟體就是這個鞍具。物理人工智慧鞍具與軟體鞍具的不同之處在於它介入的地方。軟體鞍具在工具調用邊界進行調解。物理人工智慧鞍具必須同時在控制、計算和通信上進行調解，因為學習政策的輸出跨越了這三者：它的命令改變了軌跡，它的推理時間改變了排程，而它的有效載荷改變了帶寬。機器人中介軟體是最低層的機器人堆疊層，對這三者進行調解抽象，因此它最適合組合它們的執行。它已經提供了鞍具所需的大部分功能，但缺乏對人工智慧模型的執行。我們將這一缺失的執行命名為三個功能：Projection 在發射時對每個輸出進行閘控，Isolation 界定模型的執行和傳輸時段，而 Transfer 在檢查失敗時回退到經過驗證的基線。每個功能目前在部署的機器人系統中以手工構建的應用程式代碼出現，建立在機器人中介軟體已經提供的表面上。機器人中介軟體應該將它們作為組合這三者的層來承載，而不是作為最佳的單軸執行者。我們將這描繪為 ROS 2 鞍具配置文件，這是一個部署工件，攜帶人工智慧模型的聲明輸出區域、推理預算和操作模式，同時中介軟體在 ROS 2、DDS 和 Zenoh 中執行它們。
2606.09416.author: Sanghoon Lee et.al.
2606.09416.authors: Sanghoon Lee, Jiyeong Chae, Kyung-Joon Park
